faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Yorkville?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Yorkville typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the extent of treatment needed. Larger infestations in multi-unit buildings or those requiring wall treatments and follow-up visits will be on the higher end. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my Yorkville home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common household ants (up to 1/2 inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. Unlike termites, they don't eat wood but excavate it to create nests, leaving behind sawdust-like debris called frass. You may also hear rustling sounds inside walls or see winged ants (swarmers) in spring, indicating an established colony.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Yorkville apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are quite common in Yorkville due to the neighborhood's many older buildings with wooden structural elements, window frames, and areas prone to moisture accumulation. Pre-war buildings, brownstones, and properties near Carl Schurz Park are particularly susceptible. Regular inspections and prompt treatment are essential to prevent structural damage.
